description: Execute a weekend database maintenance rollout plan for three StatefulSets in the 'data-platform' namespace. A specification document has been placed on your desktop at /home/ga/Desktop/stateful_rollout_spec.md. Read this document carefully. You must modernize the cassandra-ring update strategy, initiate a strict canary rollout for redis-cluster using partitions, and finalize an existing canary rollout for mongo-nodes. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678! (The cluster is named 'local'). Ensure you configure exact partitions and container images as requested so that the correct specific pods are updated.
